{| class="wikitable" style="width:100%; margin-top:1.5em; font-size:90%"
! colspan="2" style="font-size:105%" | [[:Category:Elder Empire|Elder Empire]]
|-
| style="white-space:nowrap" | '''Books''' || [[Of Sea and Shadow (novel)|Of Sea and Shadow]] • [[Of Shadow and Sea (novel)|Of Shadow and Sea]] • [[Of Dawn and Darkness (novel)|Of Dawn and Darkness]] • [[Of Darkness and Dawn (novel)|Of Darkness and Dawn]] • [[Of Kings and Killers (novel)|Of Kings and Killers]] • [[Of Killers and Kings (novel)|Of Killers and Kings]]
|-
| '''Magic''' || [[Reading and the Soulbound]]
|-
| '''Browse''' || [[:Category:Elder Empire characters|Characters]] • [[:Category:Elder Empire locations|Locations]] • [[:Category:Elder Empire groups|Groups]] • [[:Category:Elder Empire events|Events]] • [[:Category:Elder Empire|Everything]]
|}
